title: Signs of Construction - An Investigation into the Marks of Making
description: Group exhibition for Rotterdam Art Week 2026

Making is a conversational process. A continuous exchange between hand and material, action and response. Each gesture produces feedback - resistance, invitation, deviation - the direction is never fixed, but emerges through contact.

Material records these encounters. Cuts, joints, fractures and adjustments remain visible, accumulating as evidence of negotiation. The finished work is like a map: a surface in which these moments of decision, change and discovery are inscribed.

Bringing together ten artists and designers working across wood, metal, ceramic, plaster and other materials, the exhibition examines the traces left behind through acts of making. Each work presents its own record - an index of touch, process and material dialogue.
The space has been set up as a laboratory - a fictional facility where works can be investigated up close.
Curated by Barry Llewellyn and Lenny Stopp
Works by Thijs van Heerde, Sunhyo Mast, Sjoerd Labega, Siiri Oksanen, Sarah Roseman, Myeonga Seo, Marie Kolářová, Lenny Stöpp, Kasper Boelens and Barry Llewellyn.
